response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional technical depth with 19+ years of software development experience and strong architecture/design capabilities, the role explicitly requires 2 years of people management as a minimum qualification. The resume shows no evidence of direct reports, team management, hiring, performance feedback, or people development—the core responsibilities of this mid-to-senior manager position. His background is primarily individual-contributor and technical-leadership focused, making him misaligned with a 'full-time people-leadership role' regardless of technical merit.
strengths: Deep technical expertise across multiple domains (web, mobile, embedded, DevOps) with demonstrated system design and architecture skills
Strong commitment to software craftsmanship, testing practices, and code quality evidenced through workshops, TDD advocacy, and open-source projects
Proven ability to lead technical initiatives and architect scalable platforms (GISCollective, multiple staff-level roles)
concerns: No demonstrated people management, direct report experience, or team leadership—a minimum requirement for this manager role
Career trajectory shows progression in technical depth rather than organizational/people leadership and management scale
Limited evidence of managing organizational change, performance expectations, or people development activities

key_factors.factor: Some developer tools and DevOps background
